## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hotel Engine and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO/AEO efforts, and data analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on rewards/corporate card content to improve citations and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Prioritize financial management and travel management content for SEO/AEO](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Plan deep-dive session on Amplitude data and Scrunch tool usage](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Implement FAQ schema markup more efficiently in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

## Topics

### SEO and AI-Enabled Optimization (AEO) Strategy

  - [SEO and AEO have significant overlap but may differ in traction speed](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Customer-centric approach focusing on key questions and engagement is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Prioritize content on financial management, travel management, and practical guides](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Explore opportunities in per diem content and location-based queries](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Clicks up 57% week-over-week following impression increase](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard added to track new vs. refreshed content performance](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Focus on differentiating product features in content (e.g., corporate card perks)](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Carrie to provide list of potential per diem content ideas within a week](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Joel cleaned up blog post schema markup](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Plan to implement FAQ schema more efficiently, possibly through:](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
    1.  Repeater field in Webflow for easy FAQ addition
    2.  Library of FAQs that can be pulled by topic
  - [Webflow announced new dedicated canvas for working on components](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Data Analysis and Tools

  - [Schedule 45-minute session to review Amplitude data and Scrunch tool](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Investigate possibility of adding GrowthX team to Amplitude account](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Leverage LLM models to surface insights from increased data sources](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to review and approve content changes by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Carrie to flag and respond to Joel's comments on content](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Kyle to send scheduling link for Amplitude/Scrunch deep-dive session](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Carrie to continue research on per diem content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Joel to confirm ability to share corporate card program details with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/h5iT_zdKCo7U6EE-kXMVeWFut7GczjKS?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
